scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run --workspaces --if-present build && npm run hostinger:output
scripts.build:server: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run --workspace @workspace/api-server build
scripts.build:web: npm run --workspace @workspace/photo-viewer build && npm run hostinger:output
scripts.hostinger:output: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -R artifacts/photo-viewer/dist/public/. dist/
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run --workspaces --if-present typecheck
